key_finding: KV cache probes exceed text baseline at ALL positions 10-90%. K-probe r=0.641 vs text r=0.406 at 70% CoT (layer 27). Hidden channel carries answer info beyond text during normal generation. Surprising: V≥K for decodability (complements Phase 1 K>V for causality).
evidence_impact: FIRST Phase 2 observational evidence. Moderate strength — needs replication on Llama and stronger text baseline.
next_planned: Replicate on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct for cross-model validation

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: FIRST RESULT: KV probes > text at all positions. Moderate evidence on Qwen. V≥K for decodability complements K>V for causality. Needs Llama replication.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families, 5 variants). Phase 2 needs Llama.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 7 scans, 70+ papers. Phase 2 directly validated by 'Knowing Before Saying' and 'Probing for Arithmetic Errors'.
